Design-based survey indexes

Source: R/data.R
design_indexes.Rd

Design-based indexes as calculated from survey set data. A bootstrap with 20,000 replicates is used for calculation of standard errors and confidence intervals. See file data-raw/design-indexes.R for calculation. This is the output from running get_design_index() on all the species in the groundfish data synopsis report.

Usage

design_indexes

Format

An object of class tbl_df (inherits from tbl, data.frame) with 16675 rows and 8 columns.

See also

get_design_index()

On this page
